summary: Completed testing of Find Peers booking workflow update to match Coaching session booking. All 37 backend tests pass (14 new + 23 existing). Frontend UI verified with booking modal showing session type dropdown, conditional case type dropdown, notes field, side-by-side date/time selection, and 1.5-hour duration display.

issues: Welcome tour modal appears on every page load - may want to add 'Don't show again' option or persist dismissal

critical_code_review_comments: Booking modal correctly shows '1.5-hour peer practice session' info
Session Type dropdown has all 5 options: Case Session, Fit Interview, PEI Session, Guesstimate Practice, General Discussion
Case Type dropdown conditionally appears only when 'Case Session' is selected
Side-by-side date/time selection UI working (dates on left, times on right with 'Select a date first' prompt)
Book Session button shows '(1.5 hrs)' duration
My Sessions tab shows session_type badges (e.g., 'General discussion')
Duration (1.5 hrs) displayed on session cards
Backend APIs correctly accept and return session_type, case_type, notes, feedback_submitted fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: Peer Practice booking workflow has been updated to match Coaching session booking. Key features: 1) Pre-booking form with session type (5 options), 2) Case type selector shown only for Case sessions (7 options), 3) Additional notes field, 4) Side-by-side date/time selection using peer's actual availability, 5) Sessions are 1.5 hours (90 minutes). All backend APIs working correctly with session_type, case_type, notes parameters. Frontend booking modal and My Sessions tab display all new fields correctly.

POST /api/peers/book.details: Accepts session_type, case_type, notes parameters. Returns session with duration_minutes=90

GET /api/peers/my-sessions.details: Returns session_type, case_type, requester_notes, feedback_submitted, duration_minutes fields

GET /api/peers/availability/{peer_id}.details: Returns available_slots array with date, time, day_name format

features: Case type dropdown (conditional - only for Case sessions)
Time slots shown after date selection
Duration (1.5 hrs) shown on session cards

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real and working

known_issues.react_razorpay_overlay: Dev-mode only error overlay from react-razorpay package. Can be dismissed with Escape key or clicking X. Does not affect production.
